message:
🐛 Fix deployment name mismatch in nightly E2E (#15)

The helmfile uses RELEASE_NAME_POSTFIX (defaulting to "workload-autoscaler")
for release names, but the E2E test derives the deployment name from
guide_name ("workload-autoscaling"). This causes the test to look for
ms-workload-autoscaling-llm-d-modelservice-decode while the actual
deployment is ms-workload-autoscaler-llm-d-modelservice-decode.

Fix: set RELEASE_NAME_POSTFIX to match guide_name so helmfile release
names align with what the E2E tests expect.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
